/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/my_custom_interfaces/srv/detail/calculator__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alex/workspace/ros2_project/auto_car/my_custom_interfaces/build/my_custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
